_comment: Tier-2 for NGSolve convection_diffusion#: confirms catalog pitfall 'MUST set dgjumps=True on L2 space to allocate coupling entries'. Empirically: default L2 + skeleton integral raises NgException 'SparseMatrixTM::AddElementMatrix: illegal dnums'. dgjumps=True same-ndof but allocates the inter-element coupling sparsity. Verified 2026-06-01 (NGSolve 6.2.2604).
